on_screen_text:
Bhi-Duo Vlog: Life in America! 🇺🇸
Bhi-Duo Vlog: Reality
duolingo english test won't teach you how to cook dal-roti, but it'll get you to your dream university
summary: The ad humorously contrasts the expectation of studying in America with the reality of missing home-cooked Indian food. It features the Duolingo mascot struggling to cook dal-roti while studying. The campaign positions the Duolingo English Test as the pathway to reaching one's dream university abroad.
